name: Speech Tools

notes.en: Type text and tap Play to hear it, or tap Start listening and speak to see live transcription.
notes.ru: Введи текст и нажми Play, чтобы услышать его, или нажми Start listening и говори — текст появится вживую.

notes: Two browser-native speech tools. Text-to-Speech (SpeechSynthesis) uses voices installed on this device and works fully offline. Speech-to-Text (SpeechRecognition) requires a secure context (HTTPS or localhost) for microphone access, and in most browsers also routes audio through a cloud recognition service — so it is not guaranteed to work without an internet connection even once the secure-context requirement is met.
